(1) These rules may be Clllled the Post Office (Monthly Income Accounts) (Second Amendment)Rules, 2007. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Post Office (Monthly Income Account) Rules, 1987, in rule 9, sub-rule (1), after the proviso, the following proviso shall be inserted, namely :- -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA:EXTRAORDINARY "Provided further that a bonus equal to five per cent of tbe amount deposited, on production of the pass- book accompanied by a written application (with- drawal form) shall be paid on the deposits made in ne"jaccounts opened on or after the 8th day of D°9'mber,2007." [F.No. 2/2/2006-NS-ll] M.A KHAN, Under Secy. N<1te:- The principal rules were published vide G.S.R. 70? (E), dated the 10th August, 1987 and subsequently amended vlde G.S.R. 805(E), dated 21st July, 1988, G.S.R. 46(E), dated the 20th January, 19$9, G.S.R. 581(E), dated the 12th September,1991, G.S.R 4'.¥l(E) the 24th April,1992, G.S.R 390(E),dated the 29th April,1993,G.S.R. 585(E),dated the 2nd September, 1993, G.S.R. 5 ), dated the lstJanuary, 1999, G.S.R. 45(E),:dated the 15 January, 2000, G.S.R. 80(E), dated the 1st February, G.S.R. 613(E),dated the 18th July, 2000, G.&R. 153(E)d ed the 1st March, 2001, G.S.R.161(E)datedthe Ist March, 2, G.S.R.350(E)dated the 10th May, 2002, G.S.R. 176( ), dated the 1st March, 2003, G.S.R. 758(E),dated the 23 September,2003, G.S.R. 288 (E), dated the 13th May, 200 G.S.R. 59 (E) dated the 10th February,2006 and G.S.R. 52 (E) dated the Ist.August, 'ID7.
